chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 296 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1333/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1334/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case (Withdrawal statement filed by Advocate for petitioner on 13-03-2025 at flagged). 05-11-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Perusal of record reflects that on 13-03-2025, Counsel for the Petitioner has filed a statement for withdrawal of instant Petition; the same is accepted; consequently, the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
